data.name: InvalidDocumentIdentifier
data.value: The document identifier must be a valid GUID.

data.name: InvalidClientId
data.value: The client identifier must be a valid GUID.

data.name: InvalidLegalityPeriod
data.value: The period end date must be greater than the start date.

data.name: InvalidMonetaryAmountValue
data.value: The monetary amount value must be greater than or equal to zero.

data.name: InvalidMonetaryAmountCurrency
data.value: The monetary amount currency is required.

data.name: DuplicateDocumentIdentifier
data.value: A covenant with the same document identifier already exists.

data.name: DatabaseError
data.value: A database error occurred while saving the covenant.

data.name: InternalServerError
data.value: An unexpected internal server error occurred while processing the covenant.
